response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical breadth across languages and systems, and direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks — aligning well with key responsibilities. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders, which are core to the role.
strengths: Experienced in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development at re:cinq
Proven track record in building scalable cloud systems (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, microservices)
Strong technical leadership through workshops, open-source contributions, and mentoring
concerns: No clear demonstration of 8+ years in production-grade AI solution development
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG, or LLM evaluation pipelines
Limited evidence of leading technical discovery sessions with enterprise customers
